title: How To Read Me
content:
To turn my volumes o�er nor find
(Sweet unsuspicious friend!)
Some vestige of an erring mind
To chide or discommend,

Believe that all were lov�d like you
With love from blame exempt,
Believe that all my griefs were true
And all my joys but dreamt.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Walter Savage Landor, titled "How To Read Me", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
